description: A quiet sanctuary where the letters of the world are forged. The hum of ancient syntax fills the air. A massive lexicon sphere floats in the center.

wall.description: Shifting walls constructed of massive, unreadable blocks of letters.

floor.description: A stable floor paved with soft, parchment-like tiles.

portal_of_misery.description: A swirling distortion in the air leading back to the Peak of Misery.

portal_core.description: A glowing sphere constructed of pure alphabetic characters. It hums with the rules of spelling and grammar.
